item.text: for i1 := 0 to size * size - 1 do begin
for i2 := 0 to (NativeUInt(AreaEnd) + 1 - NativeUInt(AreaBegin)) div 4 - 1 do begin
else if i2 >= src_ then pcp^.pixel := src_ * 2 - i2 - 1
else if i2 >= src_ then pcp^.pixel := src_ * 2 - i2 - 1
FillRect(dc, i1 + 2, i2, i1 + 18, i2 + 1, GetSysColor(COLOR_WINDOW) - $020202 * (dword(i2) - 7));
for i1 := 0 to size * size - 1 do begin
DrawButton(((f11 * i1 + f21 * (8 - i1)) shr 3) and $FF00FF + ((f12 * i1 + f22 * (8 - i1)) shr 3) and $00FF00,
for i1 := 0 to size div 2 - 1 do begin
